Finish Cleaning Corrected Data (pulled from Aquarius)

# PART 2: JULY 24 - PRESENT

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
source('00_GlobalFunctions/functions.R')
```

```{r}
# import data (bad way of doing this, but doing it quick)
fp <- ('01_WaterQuality/edi-annual-updates/data/AQS-0724_1224.csv')
df_newdat <- read_csv(fp,
                      col_types = cols(
                        `Lab: MDL` = col_double(),
                        `Lab: MRL` = col_double()
                        )
                      )

df_newdat <- df_newdat %>%
  filter(is.na(`QC: Type`))

unique(df_newdat$`QC: Type`)
```
```{r}
df_newdat <- df_newdat %>%
  filter(!`Observed Property ID` %in% c('Churn Bucket ID', 'Filter Container ID'))
```


```{r}
# format for EDI
df_newedi <- df_newdat %>%
  select(`Location ID`, `Observed DateTime`, `Observed Property ID`, `Result Value`, `Result Unit`, `Lab: Detection Condition`, `Lab: MDL`, `Lab: MRL`, `EA_Reports To`, `Lab: Analysis Method`, `Lab: Quality Flag`, `EA_Field Quality Flag`, `EA_Sampling Depth`, `Field: Comment`)

df_newedi <- df_newedi %>%
  mutate(
    `Lab: Detection Condition` = 
      case_when(is.na(`Lab: Detection Condition`) ~ 'Detected',
                TRUE ~ 'Not detected')
  )

df_newedi <- df_newedi %>%
  rename(
    Station = `Location ID`,
    DateTime = `Observed DateTime`,
    Sampling_Depth = `EA_Sampling Depth`,
    Analyte = `Observed Property ID`,
    Result_Value = `Result Value`,
    Result_Unit = `Result Unit`,
    Detection_Status = `Lab: Detection Condition`,
    MRL = `Lab: MRL`,
    MDL = `Lab: MDL`,
    Reports_To = `EA_Reports To`,
    Analysis_Method = `Lab: Analysis Method`,
    Lab_QCFlag = `Lab: Quality Flag`,
    Field_QCFlag = `EA_Field Quality Flag`,
    Field_Comment = `Field: Comment`
  )

df_newedi <- df_newedi %>%
  separate(DateTime, into = c('Date', 'Time'), sep = ' ') %>%
  mutate(Analysis_Method = str_extract(Analysis_Method, '^[^;]+')) %>%
  arrange(Date, Time, Station, Analyte)

# date to datetype
df_newedi <- df_newedi %>%
  mutate(Date_raw = as.character(Date),
         Date = as.Date(Date_raw, format = '%Y-%m-%d'))

df_newedi %>%
  filter(is.na(Date)) %>%
  distinct(Date_raw)

df_newedi <- df_newedi %>%
  select(-Date_raw)

# format times
df_newedi <- df_newedi %>%
  mutate(Time = str_extract(as.character(Time), '\\d{2}:\\d{2}:\\d{2}'))
```

```{r}
unique(df_newedi$Analyte)
```

# Part 3: Combine with old data

```{r}
# read in old data
fp <- ('01_WaterQuality/edi-annual-updates/data/edi_24_draft_throughjune.csv')
df_olddat <- read_csv(fp)

df_olddat <- df_olddat %>%
  mutate(Time = as.character(Time))
```

```{r}
stopifnot(setequal(names(df_newedi), names(df_olddat)))

df_olddat <- df_olddat %>% select(all_of(names(df_newedi)))

df_combined <- bind_rows(df_olddat, df_newedi)
```

# Part 4: 2024 QC additions

```{r}
# add QC
df_qc <- read_csv('01_WaterQuality/edi-annual-updates/data/2024 Data Flags_WithCode.csv')

df_qc <- df_qc %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date, format = '%m/%d/%Y')) %>%
  select(-Time)
```

```{r}
df_final <- df_combined %>%
  left_join(df_qc, by = c('Station', 'Date', 'Analyte'))

df_qc_unmatched <- df_qc %>%
  anti_join(df_combined, by = c('Station', 'Date', 'Analyte'))

df_qc_unmatched
```

```{r}
df_final <- df_final %>%
  mutate(Field_QCFlag = coalesce(Field_QCFlag, Flag)) %>%
  select(-Flag)
```

```{r}
df_final <- df_final %>%
  mutate(
    Lab_QCFlag = Lab_QCFlag %>%
      str_replace_all(fixed('*'), 'M1') %>%
      str_replace_all('\\bB\\b','B1') %>%
      str_replace_all('F1|F2|F3', 'M1') %>%
      str_replace_all(fixed('H3'), 'H1') %>%
      str_replace_all('\\bH\\b', 'H1') %>%  
      str_replace_all(fixed('H1 H1'), 'H1') %>%
      str_replace_all(fixed('M1 M1'), 'M1') %>%
      na_if('10') %>%
      str_replace_all(fixed('R4, Analyte reporting limit raised due to high ana'),'R4')
  )

unique(df_final$Field_QCFlag)
unique(df_final$Lab_QCFlag)
```

```{r}
df_final <- df_final %>%
  mutate(Analyte = str_replace_all(Analyte, fixed('Microcystis aeruginosa'), 'MVI'))

df_final <- df_final %>%
  select(-c(MDL, Reports_To))

df_final <- df_final %>%
  mutate(
    QC_Flag = case_when(
      is.na(Field_QCFlag) & is.na(Lab_QCFlag) ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ str_squish(str_c(coalesce(Field_QCFlag, ''), coalesce(Lab_QCFlag, ''), sep = ' '))
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-Field_QCFlag, -Lab_QCFlag) %>%
  relocate(QC_Flag, .after = Analysis_Method) %>%
  relocate(Sampling_Depth, .after = Time)

df_final <- df_final %>%
  mutate(
    Result_Value = case_when(
      str_detect(QC_Flag, 'J') ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ Result_Value
    ),
    Detection_Status = case_when(
      str_detect(QC_Flag, 'J') ~ 'Not detected',
      TRUE ~ Detection_Status
    ),
    QC_Flag = QC_Flag %>%
      str_remove_all('J') %>%
      str_squish() %>%
      na_if('')
  )

unique(df_final$QC_Flag)
```

```{r}
df_dups <- df_newedi %>%
  mutate(
    Year  = year(Date),
    Month = month(Date)
  ) %>%
  count(Station, Year, Month, Analyte, name = 'n') %>%
  filter(n > 1) %>%
  arrange(desc(n), Station, Year, Month, Analyte)

df_dups
```

## Fix Depths
```{r}
df_final <- df_final %>%
  mutate(Sampling_Depth = if_else(Analyte == 'MVI', NA, Sampling_Depth))

df_final <- df_final %>%
  mutate(
    Sampling_Depth = case_when(
      str_detect(Analyte, 'Bottom') & Station == 'C10A' & Sampling_Depth < 6 ~ Sampling_Depth + 3,
      str_detect(Analyte, 'Bottom') & Station %in% c('C10A', 'C9', 'C3A') ~ Sampling_Depth,
      str_detect(Analyte, 'Bottom') ~ Sampling_Depth + 3,
      TRUE ~ Sampling_Depth
    )
  )
```

```{r}
check_analytes <- function(df, year = 'all', return_df = FALSE) {

  # read analyte reference list
  df_analytes <- read_csv('00_GlobalFunctions/dwq_analytes.csv', show_col_types = FALSE)

  # read active stations
  df_stations <- read_csv('00_GlobalFunctions/station_names.csv', show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    filter(Status == 'active')

  valid_analytes <- unique(df_analytes$Analyte)
  valid_stations <- unique(df_stations$Station_new)

  # stations exempt from full-month presence check
  exempt_month_check <- c('LSZ2-SJR', 'LSZ6-SJR', 'NZ002', 'NZ004', 'NZ325')

  # remove analytes that should never be checked
  valid_analytes <- setdiff(valid_analytes, c('Filter Container ID', 'Churn Bucket ID'))

  # normalize Date to YYYY-MM-DD and create month field
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(Month = month(Date))

  # optionally filter to one year
  if (!identical(year, 'all')) {
    df <- df %>%
      filter(str_detect(Date, paste0('^', year)))
  }

  # keep only valid stations
  df_valid <- df %>%
    filter(Station %in% valid_stations)

  # check for station-months with no data at all
  all_months <- df_valid %>%
    distinct(Month) %>%
    arrange(Month)

  missing_station_months <- expand_grid(
    Station = setdiff(valid_stations, exempt_month_check),
    all_months
  ) %>%
    anti_join(
      df_valid %>%
        distinct(Station, Month),
      by = c('Station', 'Month')
    ) %>%
    arrange(Month, Station)

  if (nrow(missing_station_months) > 0) {
    message(
      'Stations with no data for entire month(s):\n',
      missing_station_months %>%
        mutate(row_txt = paste0(Station, ' - ', Month)) %>%
        pull(row_txt) %>%
        paste(collapse = '\n')
    )
  } else {
    message('All required active stations have at least some data in every represented month.')
  }

  # join SamplingType
  df_joined <- df_valid %>%
    left_join(
      df_stations %>% select(Station_new, SamplingType),
      by = c('Station' = 'Station_new')
    )

  # gather observed stations/dates
  station_dates <- df_joined %>%
    distinct(Station, Date)

  # create expected combos (station x analyte x date)
  expected <- expand_grid(
    station_dates,
    Analyte = valid_analytes
  )

  # 1. shore stations do not require Secchi
  shore_stations <- df_stations %>%
    filter(SamplingType == 'shore') %>%
    pull(Station_new)

  expected <- expected %>%
    filter(!(Station %in% shore_stations & Analyte == 'Secchi Depth'))

  # 2. non-LSZ stations do not need Lat/Long
  expected <- expected %>%
    filter(!(
      !grepl('LSZ', Station, ignore.case = TRUE) &
        Analyte %in% c('Latitude', 'Longitude')
    ))

  # 3. only D7, D16, and D19 have Dissolved Bromide
  expected <- expected %>%
    filter(!(Analyte == 'Dissolved Bromide' &
      !(Station %in% c('D7', 'D16', 'D19'))))

  # 4. C10A does not require any analyte containing '(Bottom)'
  expected <- expected %>%
    filter(!(Station == 'C10A' & str_detect(Analyte, fixed('(Bottom)'))))

  # observed combos
  observed <- df_joined %>%
    distinct(Station, Analyte, Date)

  # find missing combinations
  missing_combos <- anti_join(
    expected,
    observed,
    by = c('Station', 'Analyte', 'Date')
  ) %>%
    arrange(Date, Station, Analyte)

  # format message
  fmt_row <- function(x) {
    parts <- x[!is.na(x) & x != '']
    paste(parts, collapse = ' - ')
  }

  if (nrow(missing_combos) > 0) {
    message(
      'Missing ', nrow(missing_combos),
      ' station/analyte combinations:\n',
      paste0(apply(missing_combos, 1, fmt_row), collapse = '\n')
    )
  } else {
    message('All expected station/analyte combinations are represented.')
  }

  if (return_df) {
    return(missing_combos)
  }
}

check_analytes(df_final, year = '2024')
```
```{r}
check_duplicates <- function(df, year = 'all', return_df = FALSE) {

  df_dups <- df %>%
    mutate(
      Year = year(Date),
      Month = month(Date)
    ) %>%
    {
      if (!identical(year, 'all')) {
        filter(., Year == as.character(year))
      } else {
        .
      }
    } %>%
    group_by(Analyte, Station, Year, Month) %>%
    filter(n() > 1) %>%
    arrange(Analyte, Station, Year, Month, Date) %>%
    ungroup()

  dup_summary <- df_dups %>%
    distinct(Analyte, Station, Year, Month)

  if (nrow(df_dups) > 0) {
    message(
      'Found duplicate Analyte/Station/Year/Month combinations: ',
      nrow(dup_summary), '\n',
      paste0(
        dup_summary %>%
          mutate(txt = paste(Analyte, Station, paste0(Year, '-', Month), sep = ' - ')) %>%
          pull(txt),
        collapse = '\n'
      )
    )
  } else {
    message('No duplicate Analyte/Station/Year/Month combinations found.')
  }

  if (return_df) {
    return(df_dups)
  }
}

check <- check_duplicates(df_final, year = '2024', return_df = TRUE)
```



```{r}
write_csv(df_final, '01_WaterQuality/edi-annual-updates/data/final/edi_2024_update_QCCodes.csv')
```
